mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate below 3% signals monetary easing that reduces the discount rate applied to equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as investors rotate into equities seeking yield.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in periods with FEDFUNDS < 3% are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.3 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions that reduce consumer confidence and discretionary spending, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as equity investors anticipate earnings downgrades.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 65% of triggered instances despite unemployment spike, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in retail sales (RSAFS) combined with rising consumer price inflation (CPIAUCSL) signals stagflationary pressure that compresses real consumer purchasing power and equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS declines > 2% month-over-month while CPIAUCSL rises > 0.3% month-over-month
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are positive in > 55% of triggered instances, or the joint effect of RSAFS and CPIAUCSL shows Rank IC < 0.04 when tested as an interaction term over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in industrial production (INDPRO) exceeding 0.5% signals weakening economic activity and reduced corporate earnings capacity, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as investors downgrade growth expectations.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in > 60% of triggered instances, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in housing starts (HOUST) combined with rising payroll employment (PAYEMS) signals robust demand-side momentum and consumer confidence, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as investors anticipate sustained earnings growth.
candidate_trigger: HOUST rises > 5% month-over-month and PAYEMS rises > 150k month-over-month
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with strong labor demand
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in > 55% of triggered instances, or the joint interaction term shows Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in payroll employment (PAYEMS) above 150,000 persons per month signals robust labor market health and rising consumer income, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as investors anticipate sustained consumer spending and corporate earnings growth.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative in > 50% of periods with PAYEMS > 150k, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate exceeds 4.5% while inflation (CPIAUCSL) remains elevated above 3% year-over-year, the Fed is in restrictive monetary policy stance that suppresses equity valuations through higher discount rates and reduced corporate profit margins, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
regime_hint: restrictive monetary policy with persistent inflation
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in > 60% of triggered instances, or the interaction term shows Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A quarter-over-quarter decline in real GDP (GDPC1) exceeding 0.5% signals economic contraction that reduces corporate earnings and investor risk appetite, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as equity valuations compress in response to recession signals.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are positive in > 55% of triggered instances, or Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window.
